summary: Initialize PhoneBio GSD artifacts and offline Vapi webhook prototype.
Initialized GSD artifacts, offline FastAPI webhook, Node fallback, tests, content, and public GitHub repo.
Live Vapi assistant creation and phone-number assignment pending Vapi credentials, phone-number ID, and public webhook URL.
Added deployment runbook, Docker/Procfile packaging, optional webhook authentication, and dry-run-safe Vapi wiring prerequisites.
Added CI, Vapi webhook fixtures, custom-LLM payload derivation, and enforced the API budget boundary: no OpenAI key; hosted InsForge webhook later became active in TASK-016.
Added deterministic v1 readiness audit, fixed exact sensor ID matching for LiDAR/UWB, exposed sensor availability, and preserved custom-LLM tool-call payloads through local Ollama forwarding.
Added local Ollama tool-call probe, scrubbed model reasoning before Vapi custom-LLM responses, and fixed custom-LLM URL precedence for explicit Vapi webhook wiring.
Shared optional Vapi bearer-secret auth across /webhook and /custom-llm/chat/completions before public tunnel/host exposure.

Added InsForge forward SQL migration and deterministic local seed JSONL export for protocols, safety sheets, hardware guides, and sensor profiles; fixed folded protocol summaries for voice/export use.
Added local hackathon call-script replay for Vapi demo turns and a centrifuge vibration troubleshooting guide so hardware rehearsal selects the intended local record.
Added redacted Vapi live preflight to verify auth, phone-number selection, webhook URL, and custom-LLM URL before creating or assigning the assistant.
Separated Vapi CLI webhook forwarding from full public app tunneling and added a public probe for /health, /webhook, and /llm/health before live wiring.
Added npx localtunnel fallback and dry-run selection to make public tunnel setup work on hackathon laptops with npm but no global tunnel binary.
Updated Vapi preflight, tests, and readiness audit to support provider-specific model URL requirements after the assistant moved to a hosted InsForge webhook plus Vapi model provider.
Fixed InsForge edge-function webhook to return Vapi tool result objects instead of JSON strings and added a Node regression test for the response contract.
Aligned InsForge edge-function tool-call parsing with local webhooks by supporting function/name/toolName/type and function.arguments/parameters/arguments/args shapes.
Deployed the updated InsForge Vapi webhook and added make hosted-probe to verify the assistant server URL returns object tool results from a Vapi-style payload.
Added hosted five-turn hackathon demo replay against the deployed InsForge Vapi webhook covering protocol, safety, hardware, sensor, and shorthand tools.
Updated planning and runbooks to reflect the current live path: Vapi plus hosted InsForge webhook, Vapi google provider, no OpenAI key, and no custom-LLM URL unless the assistant provider changes.
Improved redacted Vapi preflight diagnostics for 401 auth failures by preferring VAPI_PRIVATE_KEY over VAPI_API_KEY and reporting key source/shape without printing secrets.

Created the live PhoneBio Vapi assistant, assigned the selected Vapi phone number, and verified the assignment with redacted preflight against the returned assistant ID; call verification remains open.
Added redacted Vapi recent-call listing and make vapi-verify-call so inbound/outbound call evidence can be verified without exposing phone numbers, transcripts, recordings, or summaries.
Aligned readiness audit with the real final gate: make vapi-verify-call must find a matching Vapi call before PHONEBIO_CALL_VERIFIED=1 can mark VOICE-01 complete.
Added make vapi-wait-call to poll Vapi for a matching inbound/outbound call during live demo testing without printing phone numbers or transcripts.
Hardened vapi-wait-call so transient Vapi polling errors are captured as redacted error type/counts instead of aborting the wait command.

Set up optional Nebius Token Factory provider path aligned with the cookbook: NEBIUS_API_KEY env, OpenAI-compatible base URL/model config, make nebius-probe, docs, and tests. Probe is blocked until API key/free credits exist.
Verified Nebius Token Factory API key and model listing, added make nebius-models, confirmed make nebius-probe succeeds with an available fallback model, and documented provider/credit task routing.
